arts.ttl: “Interesting profile” – Intermediary speaks of club’s liking for Everton man, expects him to settle well
arts.sum: Dominic Calvert-Lewin’s current contract at Everton runs out in the summer of 2025. The Englishman has been a regular for the Toffees this season under Sean Dyche, playing 16 Premier League games. But he has scored only two goals and there has been no movement regarding a new deal for the striker.
